directions.name: bootstrap-stack-map-from-last-session
directions.summary: Recovered prior inventory intent and created a stack map from local project files, memory plugin manifests, Deli_AutoResearch, Looper, and sanitized source captures.

directions.name: stateful-deli-autoresearch-scaffold
directions.summary: Created Deli-style state/progress/findings/logs/prompts/scripts under autoresearch/ so future ticks do not depend on chat context.

directions.name: memory-compression-benchmark-design
directions.summary: Designed the M1 benchmark around seeded corpus strata, exact-token metrics, downstream task utility, redaction safety, external baselines, and failure-mode taxonomy.

next_direction_candidates: Exact tokenizer integration and provider token-count validation
